sv1_semantic_accuracy.description: Random 20+ item sample: verify source_text context matches extracted key and context semantically
sv1_semantic_accuracy.method: 10 items from front (EA-06_001~010), 10 items from back (EA-06_175~187), 2 additional spot checks

sv2_extraction_completeness.description: Full SOT document scan for missing C1-C8 values

missing_items.description: Specific event_type string values (e.g., wf.stage.enter, wf.stage.exit, wf.tee.retry) could be extracted as C3 enum items. Currently only the general logging structure is captured, not the individual event type strings.
missing_items.impact: LOW - these are implementation-level event names, not core design parameters

missing_items.description: Specific failure_code values (POLICY_DENY, GT_ERR_COST_LIMIT, TOOL_TIMEOUT, AGENT_CRASH) mentioned in error handling tables could be extracted as C3 enum. The general error handling thresholds are captured but not the individual code strings.
missing_items.impact: LOW - operational error codes, not design thresholds

missing_items.description: Korean-specific tokenizer configuration values (e.g., mecab dictionary path patterns, Okt fallback settings) are referenced in prose but not explicitly extracted. Core chunk_size and overlap values are captured.
missing_items.impact: LOW - implementation detail for Korean NLP, not core design parameter

sv3_key_appropriateness.description: Check for free-form key inconsistencies and category misclassification
checks_performed: Verified C1 keys follow C1_<DOMAIN>_<CONCEPT>_<QUALIFIER> pattern
Verified C2 keys include count+list pair consistency
Verified C3 keys represent true enumerations/classifications
Verified C4 keys are system/tool/framework names
Verified C5 keys define scope boundaries
Verified C6 keys represent version roadmap items
Verified C7 keys are LOCK/FREEZE threshold designations
Verified C8 keys are cross-document references

observations.description: Some QoD threshold items (e.g., EA-06_050 C7_QOD_L2_STORAGE_MIN_THRESHOLD) are categorized as C7 rather than C1. This is CORRECT because these thresholds carry LOCK designations in the SOT, making C7 the appropriate category per extraction rules.
Key naming is consistent across both source documents. Workflow items use C1_WORKFLOW_ prefix, storage items use C1_STORAGE_ prefix. No duplicate concepts found under different keys.

verdict_rationale: SV-1: All 22 sampled items show correct semantic mapping between source_text and extracted key/value. SV-2: Only 3 minor WARNING-level gaps identified (event_type strings, failure_codes, Korean tokenizer details), all LOW impact and below the 5-item SILVER threshold. SV-3: No misclassifications, no duplicate concepts, consistent key naming. Zero CRITICAL issues across all checks.

summary.overall: GOLD - Layer B semantic validation passed with no critical issues. 3 low-impact WARNING items noted for completeness but do not affect design parameter coverage.
